C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\David_Goliat.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\David_Goliat.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\David_Goliat.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\David_Goliat.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o David_Goliat.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libDavid_Goliat.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\David_Goliat.dir\linkLibs.rsp
